Antony Silva.bio: Veteran goalkeeper and longtime presence in the Paraguayan national team setup. A product of Cerro Porteno's academy, he has been a reliable shot-stopper in the domestic league for well over a decade.
Antony Silva.playingStyle: Experienced keeper who commands his area well, strong on crosses and comfortable organizing the defensive line.
Antony Silva.worldCup2026Role: First-choice goalkeeper providing calm leadership and big-game experience from the back.
Antony Silva.notableFact: At 42, he would be one of the oldest players at the 2026 World Cup, showcasing remarkable longevity in professional football.

Alberto Espinola.bio: Dynamic right-back who has been a consistent performer for Cerro Porteno in the Paraguayan top flight. Known for his energy up and down the right flank.
Alberto Espinola.playingStyle: Overlapping fullback who combines defensive discipline with effective attacking runs and crossing ability.
Alberto Espinola.worldCup2026Role: Starting right-back providing width and energy on the right side of Paraguay's defense.
Alberto Espinola.notableFact: A product of Cerro Porteno's renowned youth academy, he has been a consistent figure in one of Paraguay's most storied clubs.

Omar Alderete.bio: Imposing left-footed center-back who has made his mark in La Liga with Getafe. His aerial presence and comfort on the ball make him a modern defensive profile.
Omar Alderete.playingStyle: Ball-playing center-back with strong aerial ability, comfortable stepping forward with the ball and distributing to midfield.
Omar Alderete.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back anchoring Paraguay's defense, particularly important for set-piece situations on both ends.
Omar Alderete.notableFact: One of the few Paraguayan defenders plying his trade in La Liga, gaining experience against some of the world's best forwards every week.

Fabian Balbuena.bio: Experienced center-back who has played in England, Brazil, and Russia during a well-traveled career. Former West Ham defender known for his physicality and heading ability.
Fabian Balbuena.playingStyle: Traditional no-nonsense center-back who is strong in tackles, dominant in the air, and capable of scoring from set pieces.
Fabian Balbuena.worldCup2026Role: Veteran defensive option and senior squad presence, providing cover and leadership in the backline.
Fabian Balbuena.notableFact: Scored memorable goals during his time at West Ham United, including a debut Premier League goal that endeared him to the club's fans.

Gustavo Gomez.bio: Captain and defensive leader who has been a pillar at Palmeiras in Brazil, winning multiple titles including the Copa Libertadores. Paraguay's most experienced and decorated defender.
Gustavo Gomez.playingStyle: Commanding center-back who leads by example with aggressive defending, aerial superiority, and a knack for scoring crucial goals from set pieces.
Gustavo Gomez.worldCup2026Role: Captain and starting center-back, the emotional and defensive leader of the entire squad.
Gustavo Gomez.notableFact: Has won multiple Copa Libertadores titles with Palmeiras, making him one of the most decorated Paraguayan players of his generation.

Junior Alonso.bio: Versatile left-footed defender who has played in Argentina, Brazil, and Russia. Known for his composure on the ball and ability to play out from the back.
Junior Alonso.playingStyle: Elegant left-footed center-back who excels in possession-based systems, comfortable carrying the ball forward and picking progressive passes.
Junior Alonso.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back who provides balance alongside Gustavo Gomez, particularly valuable in building play from the back.
Junior Alonso.notableFact: Was a key player in Atletico Mineiro's historic 2021 Copa Libertadores triumph, one of the biggest achievements in the club's history.

Mathias Villasanti.bio: Dynamic box-to-box midfielder who has become a star at Gremio in the Brazilian Serie A. Combines tireless running with technical quality and an eye for goal.
Mathias Villasanti.playingStyle: Energetic central midfielder who covers huge amounts of ground, contributing to both defensive duties and attacking transitions.
Mathias Villasanti.worldCup2026Role: Starting central midfielder and the engine room of Paraguay's midfield, connecting defense to attack with his runs.
Mathias Villasanti.notableFact: Has become one of the most popular players at Gremio, where fans have embraced him as a key figure in the club's midfield.

Julio Enciso.bio: Teenage sensation who made a big-money move to Brighton in the Premier League, becoming one of the youngest Paraguayan exports to a top European league. A prodigious talent with fearless creativity.
Julio Enciso.playingStyle: Explosive attacking midfielder with dazzling dribbling, a powerful shot, and the confidence to take on defenders in any situation.
Julio Enciso.worldCup2026Role: Star playmaker and Paraguay's most talented attacker, expected to be the creative hub and main goal threat.
Julio Enciso.notableFact: Became one of the youngest Paraguayan players ever to sign for a Premier League club, arriving at Brighton at just 18 years old.

Angel Romero.bio: Experienced and versatile attacker who has been one of Paraguay's most consistent performers for over a decade. A longtime figure at Corinthians in Brazil with strong goalscoring numbers.
Angel Romero.playingStyle: Tricky winger who can play across the front line, dangerous with his pace and directness, and capable of both creating and finishing chances.
Angel Romero.worldCup2026Role: Senior attacking option who provides versatility and experience in the forward line, capable of playing on either wing.
Angel Romero.notableFact: Along with his twin brother Oscar, the Romero twins became one of the most famous footballing siblings in Paraguayan history.

Miguel Almiron.bio: Paraguay's most recognizable star on the global stage, the Newcastle winger enjoyed a sensational 2022-23 Premier League season and has been a consistent performer in English football. Previously a standout in MLS with Atlanta United.
Miguel Almiron.playingStyle: Lightning-quick winger who drives at defenders with pace, cuts inside to shoot, and presses relentlessly off the ball.
Miguel Almiron.worldCup2026Role: Star winger and talisman, Paraguay's most dangerous attacker and the player opponents will fear most.
Miguel Almiron.notableFact: Was nominated for the 2022 Ballon d'Or after a stunning run of form at Newcastle, scoring spectacular goals including long-range strikes and solo efforts.

Adam Bareiro.bio: Clinical striker who earned a move to River Plate in Argentina after prolific scoring in South American football. A natural goalscorer with strong aerial ability.
Adam Bareiro.playingStyle: Traditional target striker who excels in the penalty area, combining good movement with clinical finishing and aerial prowess.
Adam Bareiro.worldCup2026Role: Starting striker competing for the central forward role, a key source of goals for Paraguay.
Adam Bareiro.notableFact: His move to River Plate cemented his status as one of Paraguay's top strikers, joining one of South America's most prestigious clubs.

Rodrigo Fernandez.bio: Reliable backup goalkeeper plying his trade in the Brazilian Serie A with America Mineiro. Provides solid depth behind the first-choice keeper.
Rodrigo Fernandez.playingStyle: Steady shot-stopper who is dependable in one-on-one situations and comfortable with distribution from the back.
Rodrigo Fernandez.worldCup2026Role: Second-choice goalkeeper providing competition and reliable backup to Antony Silva.
Rodrigo Fernandez.notableFact: Gained valuable experience playing in the competitive Brazilian league system, one of the toughest environments for goalkeepers.

Santiago Arzamendia.bio: Attack-minded left-back who has established himself in Liga MX with Monterrey. Known for his pace down the left flank and ability to deliver dangerous crosses.
Santiago Arzamendia.playingStyle: Marauding left-back who loves to get forward, delivering crosses from wide areas and contributing to the team's attacking play.
Santiago Arzamendia.worldCup2026Role: Starting left-back providing offensive width and energy on Paraguay's left side.
Santiago Arzamendia.notableFact: Has adapted well to Mexican football after leaving Paraguay, becoming a regular starter at one of Liga MX's biggest clubs in Monterrey.

Andres Cubas.bio: Combative defensive midfielder playing in MLS with the Vancouver Whitecaps. A ball-winning specialist who provides crucial protection in front of the defense.
Andres Cubas.playingStyle: Aggressive ball-winner who excels at reading interceptions, breaking up play, and keeping things simple in possession.
Andres Cubas.worldCup2026Role: Midfield enforcer providing defensive cover and balance, either as a starter or key rotation option in central midfield.
Andres Cubas.notableFact: Has been a standout performer in MLS, earning recognition as one of the best defensive midfielders in the league.

Hernesto Caballero.bio: Young central midfielder emerging from the domestic league with Libertad. Represents the next generation of Paraguayan midfielders coming through the local system.
Hernesto Caballero.playingStyle: Tidy possession player who keeps the ball moving efficiently, contributing to buildup play with his short passing and awareness.
Hernesto Caballero.worldCup2026Role: Squad depth option in central midfield, offering a composed passing presence off the bench.
Hernesto Caballero.notableFact: A product of Libertad's youth system, one of Paraguay's most successful clubs in continental competition.

Robert Morales.bio: Experienced right-back and longtime servant of Cerro Porteno in the Paraguayan top flight. Provides veteran depth and defensive reliability to the squad.
Robert Morales.playingStyle: Defensively solid fullback who prioritizes his positional duties and is reliable in one-on-one defending situations.
Robert Morales.worldCup2026Role: Backup right-back providing experienced cover on the right side of defense.
Robert Morales.notableFact: A lifelong Cerro Porteno player, he embodies the loyalty and dedication that Paraguayan football is known for.

Alejandro Romero Gamarra.bio: Creative central midfielder known as 'Kaku' who has impressed at Gremio in Brazil. Brings flair and vision to Paraguay's midfield with his technical ability.
Alejandro Romero Gamarra.playingStyle: Technically gifted midfielder who excels in tight spaces, capable of threading key passes and controlling the tempo of matches.
Alejandro Romero Gamarra.worldCup2026Role: Creative midfield option who can unlock defenses with his passing, providing an alternative tactical approach.
Alejandro Romero Gamarra.notableFact: Known by his nickname 'Kaku,' he had a successful spell in MLS with New York Red Bulls before returning to South American football.

Blas Riveros.bio: Young left-back from Olimpia who offers defensive depth on the left side. A developing talent in Paraguay's domestic league.
Blas Riveros.playingStyle: Solid defensive fullback who is disciplined positionally and effective in one-on-one duels.
Blas Riveros.worldCup2026Role: Backup left-back option providing squad depth and competition for places in the fullback positions.
Blas Riveros.notableFact: Plays for Olimpia, one of Paraguay's most decorated clubs and the first South American team to win the Intercontinental Cup.

Derlis Gonzalez.bio: Experienced winger who had stints in European football before returning to Olimpia in Paraguay. Known for his pace and direct style of play on the right wing.
Derlis Gonzalez.playingStyle: Direct winger who uses his speed to take on defenders, dangerous when running at the backline and capable of producing moments of individual brilliance.
Derlis Gonzalez.worldCup2026Role: Experienced wide option who can stretch defenses with his pace, particularly useful as a second-half substitute.
Derlis Gonzalez.notableFact: Previously played for Dinamo Kiev in the Ukrainian Premier League, gaining Champions League experience during his time in Europe.

Antonio Sanabria.bio: Serie A striker with extensive European experience at Torino, previously at Barcelona B, Roma, and Betis. Paraguay's most proven goalscorer in top European competition.
Antonio Sanabria.playingStyle: Intelligent forward who combines well with teammates, capable of finishing with both feet and dangerous in and around the penalty area.
Antonio Sanabria.worldCup2026Role: Primary striker competing with Bareiro for the central forward spot, bringing European pedigree and big-game experience.
Antonio Sanabria.notableFact: Has spent nearly his entire career in European football, including time at FC Barcelona's youth academy, making him one of Paraguay's most seasoned European exports.

Isidro Pitta.bio: Rising striker who has been in excellent scoring form in Brazilian football with Red Bull Bragantino. A powerful forward emerging as a new option for Paraguay's attack.
Isidro Pitta.playingStyle: Strong and physical striker who leads the line effectively, good at holding up play and bringing others into the game while also being a threat in the box.
Isidro Pitta.worldCup2026Role: Emerging striking option who offers a different physical dimension to Paraguay's forward line.
Isidro Pitta.notableFact: Has been one of the breakthrough Paraguayan strikers in Brazilian football, earning his international call-up through consistent performances.

Robert Piris da Motta.bio: Versatile left-sided defender who has played across South American football, most recently at Sao Paulo. Capable of playing both left-back and center-back.
Robert Piris da Motta.playingStyle: Left-footed defender who offers versatility across the backline, comfortable going forward and delivering crosses from deep positions.
Robert Piris da Motta.worldCup2026Role: Utility defender who can cover multiple positions in the backline, providing important tactical flexibility.
Robert Piris da Motta.notableFact: Was part of Paraguay's squad for major international tournaments and has represented the country at Copa America level.

Carlos Gonzalez.bio: Third-choice goalkeeper from Olimpia who completes Paraguay's goalkeeping trio. A dependable domestic league keeper with experience in Paraguayan football.
Carlos Gonzalez.playingStyle: Reliable goalkeeper who focuses on solid positioning and safe handling, a steady presence between the posts.
Carlos Gonzalez.worldCup2026Role: Third-choice goalkeeper providing depth and training competition within the goalkeeping group.
Carlos Gonzalez.notableFact: Plays for Olimpia, Paraguay's most successful club internationally with three Copa Libertadores titles.

Ramon Sosa.bio: Exciting young winger who has made a name for himself at Talleres in Argentine football. A quick and direct attacker who has caught the eye with his dribbling and flair.
Ramon Sosa.playingStyle: Inverted winger who cuts inside from the left onto his stronger right foot, dangerous when driving at defenders and shooting from distance.
Ramon Sosa.worldCup2026Role: Exciting young attacking option who can change games with his directness and flair from the left wing.
Ramon Sosa.notableFact: Has been one of the standout young Paraguayan talents in Argentine football, drawing attention from clubs across South America.

Diego Gomez.bio: Young and talented midfielder who plays alongside Lionel Messi at Inter Miami in MLS. One of Paraguay's brightest young prospects with a big future ahead.
Diego Gomez.playingStyle: Box-to-box midfielder with excellent technical ability, capable of dictating play and contributing goals from central areas.
Diego Gomez.worldCup2026Role: Rising midfield talent who provides youth and dynamism, either as a starter or high-impact substitute.
Diego Gomez.notableFact: Plays alongside Lionel Messi at Inter Miami, gaining invaluable experience training and competing with one of football's greatest ever players.

Wilder Viera.bio: Emerging midfielder from Libertad who has recently broken into the national team picture. Represents the new wave of Paraguayan midfield talent.
Wilder Viera.playingStyle: Industrious central midfielder who contributes defensive work and keeps possession ticking over with simple, effective passing.
Wilder Viera.worldCup2026Role: Young squad player who adds midfield depth and energy, available as a fresh-legs option from the bench.
Wilder Viera.notableFact: Part of a strong Libertad squad that has been one of the top clubs in Paraguayan football in recent years.
